specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: win7
  • Processor: x86_32 CPU with SSE2 instructions, any x86_64 CPU, ARMv8 CPU. Example: Intel Core 2 Duo E8200, AMD Athlon XE BE-2300, Snapdragon X Elite
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated graphics with full Vulkan 1.0 support. Example: Intel HD Graphics 5500 (Broadwell), AMD Radeon R5 Graphics (Kaveri)
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: win10
  • Processor: x86_64 CPU with SSE4.2 instructions, with 4 physical cores or more, ARMv8 CPU Example: Intel Core i5-6600K, AMD Ryzen 5 1600, Snapdragon X Elite
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Dedicated graphics with full Vulkan 1.2 support Example: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 (Pascal), AMD Radeon RX 460 (GCN 4.0)
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
